tips_en: Start with Paper 1 on multilingual code generation evaluation—its finding that Python performance is not a reliable proxy for cross-lingual coding competence is a wake-up call for anyone deploying LLMs, and the automatic STDIN/STDOUT conversion pipeline is a reusable methodology. All three papers share a unifying theme of probing whether LLMs truly generalize or remain narrowly specialized: Paper 1 across programming languages, Paper 2 (PerceptionDLM) across visual regions via diffusion-based parallel decoding, and Paper 3 (RATS) across robotic tasks via self-directed play. Read Paper 2 next for its striking results—62.4% accuracy (nearly 2× LLaDA-V) with 3.5× throughput—offering a compelling efficiency-angle complement to Paper 1's generalization concerns.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读第1篇关于多语言代码生成评估的论文——其发现Python性能无法可靠代表跨语言编码能力，对任何部署LLM的人来说都是重要警示，且其自动STDIN/STDOUT转换流水线是可复用的方法论。三篇论文共享一个核心主题：探究LLM是真正泛化还是仍局限于狭窄领域——第1篇跨编程语言，第2篇（PerceptionDLM）通过扩散模型并行解码跨视觉区域，第3篇（RATS）通过自导演练跨机器人任务。下一篇推荐阅读第2篇，其结果令人印象深刻——准确率达62.4%（接近LLaDA-V的两倍），吞吐量提升3.5倍，为第1篇的泛化关切提供了一个引人注目的效率角度补充。
